settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, plan, and preferences.
settings.profileSubtitle: Your personal information as shown across the app.
settings.name: Name
settings.preferencesSubtitle: General settings and automated behaviors across FreelanceHub.
settings.autoDraftSubtitle: When enabled, creating a project will automatically generate a draft invoice matching the project budget.
settings.themeSubtitle: Customize how FreelanceHub looks on your device.
settings.currencySubtitle: The primary currency used when generating your invoices.
settings.timezoneSubtitle: Used for project deadlines and invoice issue dates.
settings.dateFormatSubtitle: How dates should be presented across the application.
settings.paymentDetailsSubtitle: This information will be printed at the bottom of all your generated PDF invoices.
settings.paymentDetailsPlaceholder: e.g. Please wire funds to Account #12345678...
settings.passwordSubtitle: Change your password or reset it via email.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used across the application.
language.proRequired: Pro plan required for Simplified Chinese and Arabic.

settings.proActive: You're on Pro — all limits are removed.
settings.freeUsage: Your current usage against Free tier limits.
settings.proUnlimited: ✓ All limits removed — enjoy unlimited access to every feature.
settings.upgradeSubtitle: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited access and advanced features.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and account settings.
profile.deleteWarning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.

onboarding.title: Welcome to FreelanceHub
onboarding.subtitle: Let's set up your account in just a few steps.
onboarding.step2Subtitle: Tell us about your freelance work.

upgrade.title: Upgrade to Pro
upgrade.description: Unlock unlimited access to all features.

language.title: This language requires Pro
language.description: Simplified Chinese and Arabic are available on the Pro plan. Upgrade to unlock all 6 languages.

projects.title: Project limit reached
projects.description: You've reached the free plan limit. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited projects.

clients.title: Client limit reached
clients.description: You've reached the free plan limit. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited clients.

invoices.title: Invoice limit reached
invoices.description: You've reached the free plan limit. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited invoices.

portals.title: Client portal requires Pro
portals.description: Upgrade to Pro to create unlimited secure client portals.

hero.subtext: Manage clients, track projects, send invoices, and monitor your earnings — all from one powerful dashboard.

features.sectionSubtitle: Powerful tools designed for freelancers who mean business.
features.manageProjectsDesc: Organize tasks, deadlines, and deliverables in one place.
features.trackClientsDesc: Keep all client info, communications, and history organized.
features.sendInvoicesDesc: Generate professional invoices and get paid faster.
features.monitorRevenueDesc: Real-time earnings analytics and financial insights.
features.timeTrackingDesc: Log hours effortlessly and bill clients accurately.
features.secureAuthDesc: Enterprise-grade security to protect your business data.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Onboard clients and set up projects in seconds.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Log time, create invoices, and send them instantly.
howItWorks.step3Desc: See your revenue grow with real-time analytics.

testimonials.quote1: FreelanceHub transformed how I manage my design clients. Invoicing used to take hours — now it's minutes.
testimonials.quote2: The dashboard gives me a complete picture of my business. Revenue tracking alone is worth it.
testimonials.quote3: I've tried a dozen tools. FreelanceHub is the only one that actually feels built for freelancers.

cta.headline1: Take Control of Your Freelance Business
cta.subtext: Join thousands of freelancers who've streamlined their workflow with FreelanceHub.

showcase.subtext: A bird's-eye view of your entire freelance operation.
